In [1]:
import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, GridSearchCV
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeClassifier, plot_tree
from sklearn.svm import SVC
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, classification_report
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from sklearn.discriminant_analysis import LinearDiscriminantAnalysis as LDA
import plotly.express as px

# Load the dataset
df = pd.read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasciencedojo/datasets/master/titanic.csv')

# Data Preprocessing
# Fill missing values
df['Age'].fillna(df['Age'].median(), inplace=True)
df['Embarked'].fillna(df['Embarked'].mode()[0], inplace=True)

# Drop irrelevant columns
df.drop(columns=['PassengerId', 'Name', 'Ticket', 'Cabin'], inplace=True)

# Encode categorical variables
df = pd.get_dummies(df, columns=['Sex', 'Embarked'], drop_first=True)

# Split the data into features and target
X = df.drop(columns=['Survived'])
y = df['Survived']

# Split the data into training and testing sets
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.3, random_state=42)

# Scale numerical variables
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_train[['Age', 'Fare']] = scaler.fit_transform(X_train[['Age', 'Fare']])
X_test[['Age', 'Fare']] = scaler.transform(X_test[['Age', 'Fare']])

# Function to plot decision boundaries for PCA
def plot_decision_boundary_pca(clf, X, y, title):
    pca = PCA(n_components=2)
    X_pca = pca.fit_transform(X)

    h = .02  # step size in the mesh
    x_min, x_max = X_pca[:, 0].min() - 1, X_pca[:, 0].max() + 1
    y_min, y_max = X_pca[:, 1].min() - 1, X_pca[:, 1].max() + 1
    xx, yy = np.meshgrid(np.arange(x_min, x_max, h), np.arange(y_min, y_max, h))

    Z = clf.predict(pca.inverse_transform(np.c_[xx.ravel(), yy.ravel()]))
    Z = Z.reshape(xx.shape)
    
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
    plt.contourf(xx, yy, Z, alpha=0.8)
    scatter = plt.scatter(X_pca[:, 0], X_pca[:, 1], c=y, edgecolors='k', marker='o', cmap=plt.cm.RdYlBu)
    plt.title(title)
    plt.xlabel('PCA Component 1')
    plt.ylabel('PCA Component 2')
    plt.legend(*scatter.legend_elements(), title="Classes")
    plt.show()

# Function to plot decision boundaries for LDA
def plot_decision_boundary_lda(clf, X, y, title):
    lda = LDA(n_components=1)
    X_lda = lda.fit_transform(X, y)
    
    h = .02  # step size in the mesh
    x_min, x_max = X_lda.min() - 1, X_lda.max() + 1
    xx = np.linspace(x_min, x_max, 100)
    
    plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
    scatter = plt.scatter(X_lda, np.zeros_like(X_lda), c=y, edgecolors='k', marker='o', cmap=plt.cm.RdYlBu)
    plt.title(title)
    plt.xlabel('LDA Component 1')
    plt.ylabel('')
    plt.legend(*scatter.legend_elements(), title="Classes")
    plt.show()

# Function to train and evaluate models
def train_and_evaluate_model(model, param_grid, X_train, y_train, X_test, y_test, method):
    grid_model = GridSearchCV(model, param_grid, cv=5)
    grid_model.fit(X_train, y_train)
    y_pred = grid_model.predict(X_test)
    accuracy = accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred)
    print(f"{model.__class__.__name__} Best Params ({method}):", grid_model.best_params_)
    print(f"{model.__class__.__name__} Accuracy ({method}):", accuracy)
    print(classification_report(y_test, y_pred))
    
    if method == 'PCA':
        plot_decision_boundary_pca(grid_model.best_estimator_, X_test, y_test, f"{model.__class__.__name__} Decision Boundary ({method})")
    elif method == 'LDA':
        plot_decision_boundary_lda(grid_model.best_estimator_, X_test, y_test, f"{model.__class__.__name__} Decision Boundary ({method})")
    
    return accuracy

# Models and parameter grids
models = [
    (LogisticRegression(), {'C': [0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 100], 'solver': ['liblinear', 'saga']}),
    (RandomForestClassifier(), {'n_estimators': [100, 200], 'max_depth': [None, 10], 'criterion': ['gini', 'entropy']}),
    (DecisionTreeClassifier(), {'max_depth': [None, 4, 10], 'min_samples_split': [2, 10], 'min_samples_leaf': [1, 4], 'criterion': ['gini', 'entropy']}),
    (SVC(), {'C': [0.1, 1, 10], 'gamma': [1, 0.1, 0.01], 'kernel': ['rbf']})
]

# Apply PCA
pca = PCA(n_components=2)
X_train_pca = pca.fit_transform(X_train)
X_test_pca = pca.transform(X_test)

print("PCA Results:")
pca_accuracies = [train_and_evaluate_model(model, param_grid, X_train_pca, y_train, X_test_pca, y_test, 'PCA') for model, param_grid in models]

# Apply LDA
lda = LDA(n_components=1)
X_train_lda = lda.fit_transform(X_train, y_train)
X_test_lda = lda.transform(X_test)

print("\nLDA Results:")
lda_accuracies = [train_and_evaluate_model(model, param_grid, X_train_lda, y_train, X_test_lda, y_test, 'LDA') for model, param_grid in models]

# Summary of accuracies
print("\nSummary of Accuracies:")
for model, pca_acc, lda_acc in zip(models, pca_accuracies, lda_accuracies):
    print(f"{model[0].__class__.__name__} - PCA Accuracy: {pca_acc:.4f}, LDA Accuracy: {lda_acc:.4f}")

# Determine the best model
best_pca_model = max(zip(pca_accuracies, [model[0].__class__.__name__ for model in models]), key=lambda x: x[0])
best_lda_model = max(zip(lda_accuracies, [model[0].__class__.__name__ for model in models]), key=lambda x: x[0])

print(f"\nThe best model with PCA is {best_pca_model[1]} with an accuracy of {best_pca_model[0]:.4f}.")
print(f"The best model with LDA is {best_lda_model[1]} with an accuracy of {best_lda_model[0]:.4f}.")
